description: Diorama scene geometry -- semicircle of planes arranged at varying Z-depths, like layers of a paper theater. Camera pushes in gently. Closest to traditional parallax but with real perspective foreshortening on the outer planes. Defines slot positions, rotations, sizes, required/optional flags, compatible cameras, default camera, and fog settings per Section 4.2.
notes: Tier 2 geometry. Medium priority. 6 slots (2 required: backdrop, subject; 4 optional: wing_left, wing_right, midground, near_fg). Wings rotated +-PI/10 inward. 5 compatible cameras. Theatrical dark-blue fog.
